candidates.name: latency

rationale.parallelism: TP/PP/DP omitted because all are 1 (single-GPU config).
rationale.--gpu-memory-utilization: Set to 0.87 for latency profile on this GPU class.
rationale.--max-model-len: Set to 4096 based on requested context limits and model capacity.
rationale.--max-num-seqs: latency scheduler cap chosen as 24 to balance concurrency vs TTFT risk.
rationale.--enable-chunked-prefill: Enabled as a good default for mixed/long prompt handling.
rationale.--max-num-batched-tokens: Set to 1024 as the latency chunk size limit.
rationale.--max-num-partial-prefills: Set to 2 for latency prefill scheduling.
rationale.--max-long-partial-prefills: Set to 1 to limit long-prefill dominance in latency profile.
rationale.--enable-prefix-caching: Enabled because shared prefixes are expected and/or family preset recommends it.
rationale.--async-scheduling: Disabled for latency profile to protect TTFT under strict latency goals.
rationale.--stream-interval: Set to 1 for latency streaming overhead tradeoff.
rationale.--disable-log-requests: Enabled to reduce request logging overhead.

tuning_knobs: `--max-num-seqs`: Decrease to further protect TTFT (Time To First Token), or increase slightly if you have VRAM to spare.
`--max-num-batched-tokens`: Lower values force the scheduler to yield more often, improving streaming smoothness at the cost of overall throughput.

candidates.name: balanced

rationale.parallelism: TP/PP/DP omitted because all are 1 (single-GPU config).
rationale.--gpu-memory-utilization: Set to 0.88 for balanced profile on this GPU class.
rationale.--max-model-len: Set to 4096 based on requested context limits and model capacity.
rationale.--max-num-seqs: balanced scheduler cap chosen as 48 to balance concurrency vs TTFT risk.
rationale.--enable-chunked-prefill: Enabled as a good default for mixed/long prompt handling.
rationale.--max-num-batched-tokens: Set to 2048 as the balanced chunk size limit.
rationale.--max-num-partial-prefills: Set to 4 for balanced prefill scheduling.
rationale.--max-long-partial-prefills: Set to 1 to limit long-prefill dominance in balanced profile.
rationale.--enable-prefix-caching: Enabled because shared prefixes are expected and/or family preset recommends it.
rationale.--async-scheduling: Enabled for balanced profile to improve throughput/ITL.
rationale.--stream-interval: Set to 5 for balanced streaming overhead tradeoff.
rationale.--disable-log-requests: Enabled to reduce request logging overhead.

tuning_knobs: `--max-num-seqs`: Tune up or down based on your SLA. Higher = better throughput, Lower = better latency.
`--max-model-len`: Lowering this limits maximum request size but allows more simultaneous requests.
`--enable-chunked-prefill`: Toggling this off might improve small-prompt performance, but can severely penalize TTFT for concurrent requests if prompts are large.

candidates.name: throughput

rationale.parallelism: TP/PP/DP omitted because all are 1 (single-GPU config).
rationale.--gpu-memory-utilization: Set to 0.89 for throughput profile on this GPU class.
rationale.--max-model-len: Set to 4096 based on requested context limits and model capacity.
rationale.--max-num-seqs: throughput scheduler cap chosen as 72 to balance concurrency vs TTFT risk.
rationale.--enable-chunked-prefill: Enabled as a good default for mixed/long prompt handling.
rationale.--max-num-batched-tokens: Set to 4096 as the throughput chunk size limit.
rationale.--max-num-partial-prefills: Set to 8 for throughput prefill scheduling.
rationale.--max-long-partial-prefills: Set to 2 to limit long-prefill dominance in throughput profile.
rationale.--enable-prefix-caching: Enabled because shared prefixes are expected and/or family preset recommends it.
rationale.--async-scheduling: Enabled for throughput profile to improve throughput/ITL.
rationale.--stream-interval: Set to 10 for throughput streaming overhead tradeoff.
rationale.--disable-log-requests: Enabled to reduce request logging overhead.

tuning_knobs: `--max-num-seqs`: Increase to maximize batching efficiency, up to the limits of your KV cache.
`--max-num-batched-tokens`: Increase to allow more prompt tokens to be processed in a single forward pass, heavily utilizing GPU compute.
`--max-model-len`: If your workload doesn't need the full context window, decreasing this frees up significant KV cache for even higher concurrency.
